allow: PowerShell(& "F:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat" config --android-sdk 2>&1; Get-ChildItem "F:\\" -Directory | Select-Object Name | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "Android|android|sdk"})

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('assets/jsons/emergency_situations_200.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); cats={}; [cats.update\({s['category']: cats.get\(s['category'],0\)+1}\) for s in data['emergency_situations']]; print\('Total:', len\(data['emergency_situations']\)\); print\('Categories:', cats\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('assets/jsons/emergency_situations_200.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('Total:', len\(data['emergency_situations']\)\); cats={}; [cats.__setitem__\(s['category'], cats.get\(s['category'],0\)+1\) for s in data['emergency_situations']]; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in cats.items\(\)]")

PowerShell($javaHome = $env:JAVA_HOME; if \($javaHome\) { "$javaHome\\bin\\keytool.exe" } else { Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Java","C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr\\bin","C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jre\\bin" -Filter keytool.exe -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName })
